rationale: The citing article is an editorial/conceptual synthesis that reviews many prior studies on multimedia data, and the cited article is a specific empirical eWOM study on online review text and manager responses, so it is plausibly relevant as prior literature. However, the matched evidence provides only a single DOI reference with no in-text citation context or surrounding sentence, making it impossible to tell whether the use is substantive or merely illustrative. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop but also not strong enough to clearly keep.
